task: Add the cheapest certified refurbished iPad Air with 256GB of storage in any shade of blue to my bag.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to Apple’s Certified Refurbished iPad listings, which were explicitly sorted by Price: Low to High. In the visible results, the first matching product that satisfied all constraints (iPad Air, 256GB, blue) was “Refurbished 11-inch iPad Air (M3) Wi‑Fi + Cellular 256GB - Blue” at $679. The agent opened that exact product page, where the title, 256GB storage, and Blue color were confirmed, then clicked “Add to Bag.” The final bag page at https://www.apple.com/shop/bag shows that exact item present in the bag with quantity 1 and price $679. Although the bag page also displayed a warning that some items were no longer available, the requested iPad Air is clearly in the bag, so the task was completed.
final_result_response: Done. I added the Refurbished 11-inch iPad Air (M3) Wi‑Fi + Cellular 256GB in Blue to your Apple bag for $679.
action_history: Opening Apple homepage: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.apple.com/');
Opening Certified Refurbished section: await page.locator('e125').click();
Opening refurbished iPad listings: await page.locator('e55').click();
Opening cheapest matching iPad Air: await page.locator('e268').click();
Adding iPad Air to bag: await page.locator('e84').click();
